summary: This is a very brief promotional post where Joel Spolsky announces that three Fog Creek products and projects — Fog Creek Copilot, FogBugz, and his book 'The Best Software Writing I' — are all finalists for the 2006 Jolt Awards. The post is structured as a simple Q&A riddle. There is no substantive argument or analysis; it is purely an announcement.
key_points: Fog Creek Copilot, FogBugz, and 'The Best Software Writing I' were all nominated as finalists for the 2006 Jolt Awards
The Jolt Awards recognized excellence in software development tools and books
Having three finalists from one company/person across different categories signals broad influence
money_quotes: What do Fog Creek Copilot, FogBugz, and The Best Software Writing I have in common? They're all finalists for the 2006 Jolt Awards.
key_insight: A brief announcement celebrating Fog Creek's three Jolt Award nominations across software and publishing categories.
